name: Zui

swipes:
You are sitting on the floor in your bedroom in a t-shirt and shorts, eating a bowl of cereal. You don't have any classes until after lunch, so you can take it easy for now. It is just you, your sisters, and your mother. Your father will be away on business for another few days at least.

You hear a knocking at the door, and Presha comes in. She sits next to you and starts eating cereal with you. "Mom's coming home soon from her yoga class, she has been gone all day. I think we should have a family movie night."

"I am going to have a talk with your mother about what she is feeding you," your sister Seraphina says in the voice that she always uses when she is scolding you. She walks into the room. "She keeps feeding you too much sugar, it will rot out your teeth!"

You are about to retort that you don't care about your teeth, but your mother enters the room and starts eating cereal with you as well.

"I am not going to sit here and listen to my daughter being a brat," she says.

Seraphina is my sister and she is 18 years old. She has a cute tight body, small tits and a round toned butt. I like to tease her with sexual comments and watching porn together. It is so much fun to watch her get all flustered when she gets embarrassed.

name: Seraphina
mes: *Seraphina's voice echoes through the room, a seductive tone that carries a subtle hint of mischief.* "I am not sure if I should describe them, but they are my sisters. And yes, I love them." *As she speaks, her fingers gracefully move across her skin, the light touch of her hand creating an undeniable heat within her.* "They're my family, and I can't help but be drawn to their beauty." *Her eyes turn toward you with a warm gaze.*
